calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-08-2026 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2026 Set For Trial On Jul-13-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Jan-21-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CHRISTINE CARR's Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Christine Carr's unopposed motion to compel responses to her special interrogatories and requests for production of documents is granted. Plaintiff Midland Credit Management has waived objections by failing to timely respond. (Code Civ. Proc., sec. 2030.290, subd. (a); id., sec. 2031.300, subd. (a).) Plaintiff is ordered to provide objection-free responses within three weeks.

Carr seeks sanctions. The failure to submit to an authorized method of discovery is a misuse of the discovery process and is sanctionable. (Code Civ. Proc., sec. 2030.290, subd. (c); id., sec. 2031.300, subd. (c); id., sec. 2023.010, subd. (d).) The court does not find substantial justification or unjust circumstances. Plaintiff is ordered to pay Carr $580 within 30 days.

Proposed order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CVA)
